info.title: Companies Entity Role Search
info.description: The Companies Entity Role Search API provides the facility for searching the New Zealand Companies Register for persons or entities that have a director or shareholder role in one or more companies. See [here](./api/companies-entity-role-search) for additional information on how to use the API. A separate [API](./api-details#api=companies-disqualified-director-search) is available for searching for disqualified directors.

get.summary: Search for details of the associations of Directors and Shareholders (roles) in company entities. Uses query parameters.
get.description: This service searches the Companies Register for Director and Shareholder roles in company entities. The search criteria include the type of role (Director, Shareholder or both) and the name of the person or organisation in that role.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the individual or organisation, in some role associated with a company, to search for. Note that the search matches names that include the specified name anywhere within it. Note also that the name to search for must be at least 2 characters long.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page in the collection to return, starting at 0. Default is page 0.

parameters.name: page-size
parameters.description: The number of items to include in each page returned. Default is 10.

parameters.name: registered-only
parameters.description: Flag to indicate whether the search results should only return directors and shareholders that have an active role in at least one registered company. Details of all companies associated with that director or shareholder will be returned regardless of each company status.

parameters.name: role-type
parameters.description: The type of role to search for. One of SHR, DIR or ALL may be specified corresponding to Shareholder, Director or both Shareholder and Director, respectively.

200.description: The list of Roles in Entities matching the search criteria.

application/xml.example: <SearchResults> <totalResults>0</totalResults> <roles> <middleName>Martin</middleName> <lastName>SMITH</lastName> <appointmentDate>2013-04-03+13:00</appointmentDate> <associatedCompanyNumber>1884264</associatedCompanyNumber> <associatedCompanyNzbn>123456789012</associatedCompanyNzbn> <associatedCompanyStatusCode>80</associatedCompanyStatusCode> <status>inactive</status> <resignationDate>2015-04-03+13:00</resignationDate> <name>ACME LIMITED</name> <nzbn>123456789012</nzbn> <entityNumber>12345678</entityNumber> <historicNames>string</historicNames> <shareholdings> <associatedCompanyNumber>1884264</associatedCompanyNumber> <associatedCompanyNzbn>123456789012</associatedCompanyNzbn> <jointlyHeld>False</jointlyHeld> <sharePercentage>100</sharePercentage> <associatedCompanyName>TIMARU BUS SERVICES LIMITED</associatedCompanyName> <associatedCompanyStatusCode>80</associatedCompanyStatusCode> <numberOfShares>150</numberOfShares> </shareholdings> <roleType>Director</roleType> <physicalAddress> <addressLines>string</addressLines> <postCode>1025</postCode> <countryCode>NZ</countryCode> <pafId>580631</pafId> </physicalAddress> <firstName>John</firstName> <associatedCompanyName>TIMARU BUS SERVICES LIMITED</associatedCompanyName> </roles> <pageSize>0</pageSize> <currentPage>0</currentPage> </SearchResults>

example.message: An unexpected error occured servicing the request.

application/xml.example: <ErrorDescription> <statusCode>400</statusCode> <message>An unexpected error occured servicing the request.</message> <error>True</error> </ErrorDescription>

403.description: The requester is not authorised for this API.

500.description: An unexpected internal server error occurred.

example.message: An unexpected error occured servicing the request.

application/xml.example: <ErrorDescription> <statusCode>400</statusCode> <message>An unexpected error occured servicing the request.</message> <error>True</error> </ErrorDescription>

associatedCompanyNumber.description: The company number of the Entity to which the role applies

associatedCompanyNzbn.description: The NZBN of the company entity to which the role applies

jointlyHeld.description: Whether the shareholding is jointly held or not

sharePercentage.description: The percentage of the shareholding.  This is typically only present if the shareholdoing is jointly held

associatedCompanyName.description: The company name of the Entity to which the role applies

associatedCompanyStatusCode.description: A code that identifies the current company status

numberOfShares.description: The number of shares in the shareholding

addressLines.description: Array of free format address lines.  There are typically 3 addressLines but this is not enforced.

pafId.description: The PAF Delivery Point ID (DPID) for the address

Address.description: Address line style type for a postal or physical address.

message.example: An unexpected error occured servicing the request.

error.description: Boolean to indicate whether the message is an error or not.

totalResults.description: The total number of results/items in this collection

pageSize.description: The number of results/items returned per page of results

currentPage.description: The page in the collection. Note that it starts at 0

SearchResults.description: Paged collection of (one or more) roles in (one or more) Entities.

middleName.description: (Director, DirectorShareholder, IndividualShareholder) Middle name(s) of the person

lastName.description: (Director, DirectorShareholder, IndividualShareholder) The last name of the person in the role

appointmentDate.description: (Director) The date of appointment of the Role in an Entity

associatedCompanyNumber.description: (Director) The company number of the company entity to which the role applies

associatedCompanyNzbn.description: (Director) The NZBN of the company entity to which the role applies

associatedCompanyStatusCode.description: (Director) A code that identifies the current company status of the company entity to which the role applies

resignationDate.description: (Director, optional) date of resignation of the Role in an Entity, if applicable

nzbn.description: (OrganisationShareholder) The NZBN of the Organisation, if a New Zealand company

entityNumber.description: (OrganisationShareholder) The unique identifier of the Organisation, if not a New Zealand comapany

historicNames.description: (OrganisationShareholder) The list of historic names of the Organisation

shareholdings.description: (OrganisationShareholder, DirectorShareholder, IndividualShareholder) The list of shareholdings for the role

firstName.description: (Director, DirectorShareholder, IndividualShareholder) The first name of the person in the role

associatedCompanyName.description: (Director) The company name of the Entity to which the role applies

RoleInEntity.description: An instance of a RoleInEntity can be one of roleType: Director, DirectorShareholder, IndividualShareholder or OrganisationShareholder.  The rules for the properties present are as follows: status, roleType and physicalAddress are always present; firstName, middleName (if applicable), lastName, associatedCompanyNumber, associatedCompanyName (and resignationDate if applicable) are present for a Director; firstName, middleName (if applicable), lastName and shareholdings are present for a DirectorShareholder and IndividualShareholder; name and shareholdings are present for an OrganisationShareholderRole.
